CustomField.formula: if(ISBLANK(Order_S__c) ,if( DATEVALUE(CreatedDate) >= DATE(2019,02,09), Paid_Amount__c + Credit_Note__c, Order__r.Amount_Paid__c + Credit_Note__c),if( DATEVALUE(CreatedDate) >= DATE(2019,02,09), Paid_Amount__c + Credit_Note__c, Order_S__r.Amount_Paid__c + Credit_Note__c))
CustomField.label: Amount Paid
